stemHtml: What is true regarding the effects of smoking tobacco?

options.a: The ability to withstand g-forces is NOT affected by whether the pilot smokes tobacco or not.
options.b: Smoking tobacco can become a risk to flight safety because it reduces the ability to resist hypoxia.
options.c: The harmful effects of smoking tobacco on the cardiovascular system will disappear as soon as the pilot gives up smoking.
options.d: Smoking tobacco can be beneficial to teamwork if several crew members are smokers.
